seoTitle: Commissariat Point vs Compton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Commissariat Point vs Compton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Commissariat Point and Compton.
heading: Commissariat Point vs Compton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Commissariat Point, South Australia and Compton, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Commissariat Point has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Compton (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Commissariat Point or Compton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Commissariat Point has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Compton scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Commissariat Point scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Compton scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Commissariat Point or Compton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Commissariat Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
